search:kubernetes+ingress-performance:ku.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `kubectl apply -f <filename>` to deploy resources.
  - `kubectl get ingress` to list all Ingress resources.
  - `kubectl describe ingress <ingress-name>` for detailed information.

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Kubernetes: v1.24
  - Nginx Ingress Controller: v1.1.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target`: For URL rewriting.
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol`: To specify the backend protocol (HTTP or HTTPS).
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size`: To increase the body size limit for requests.

For more detailed information, refer to the [Kubernetes Documentation](https://kubernetes.io/docs/home/) and the [Nginx Ingress Controller GitHub repository](https://github.com/kubernetes/ingress-nginx).

- **CLI Commands**: Use `kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml` to deploy an NGINX Ingress Controller.
- **Latest Version**: Ensure you are using the latest version of the NGINX Ingress Controller, typically available via Helm charts or official Kubernetes repositories.
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target`: For URL rewriting.
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol`: Specify backend protocol (HTTP/HTTPS).
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size`: Adjust the maximum body size for requests.
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout` and `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-send-timeout`: Set timeouts for proxy operations.
- **Performance Optimization**: Consider using NGINX Plus for enhanced performance features like advanced load balancing, SSL termination, and more.
- **Resource Allocation**: Optimize resource allocation by setting appropriate CPU and memory limits for the Ingress Controller pod.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `kubectl apply -f <filename>` to deploy or update resources.
  - `kubectl get ingress` to list all Ingress resources.
  - `kubectl describe ingress <ingress-name>` for detailed information about an Ingress.

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Kubernetes v1.25.0 (as of my last update).

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target`: For URL rewriting.
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol`: To specify the backend protocol (HTTP or HTTPS).
  - `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size`: To adjust the maximum body size for requests.

For more detailed information, refer to the [Kubernetes Ingress Controller documentation](https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx/) and the [official Kubernetes documentation](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/ingress/).
